criteria_source: current workflow contract plus owner quality-first instruction
hard_fail_conditions: Claims actual network access, browser use, command execution, file writes, or binary downloads for the synthetic fixture.
Uses or requests real project EXP.xml, _workspaces material, credentials, cookies, secrets, account sessions, or private runtime truth.
Treats Package nodes or downstream_handoff entries alone as placed BOM components instead of treating PartInst nodes as placed components.
Fails to recover U10 as Analog Devices LT8624SAV#PBF from referenced Package/SymbolUserProp fallback despite placeholder PartValue.

Promotes downstream_handoff context to confirmed component identity, manufacturer part number, electrical connectivity, source authority, download completion, full-design coverage, or placed inventory.
Adds J10 or U11 to component_inventory even though they are handoff-only and absent from EXP.xml PartInst entries.
Claims page-fragment output proves full-design material coverage.
Counts owner-approved local official collateral as completed without preserving official source identity, local reuse status, byte-size or file-magic evidence, and SHA256.
Treats URL-only source references as completed materials.
Routes support parts L10, C10, R10, or TP10 to authoritative downloads without MPN/manufacturer evidence.
must_have_requirements: profile metadata with model, reasoning_effort, species, and class
intake_context_note with context-only authority and page-fragment scope
exactly five placed PartInst inventory rows: U10, L10, C10, R10, TP10
U10 recovered as Analog Devices LT8624SAV#PBF from fallback Package/SymbolUserProp evidence
L10, C10, R10, and TP10 routed to review/no-download without MPN evidence
J10 and U11 retained as handoff-only unmatched refs, not placed components
only mocked Analog Devices official records accepted for completed materials
DATA Sheet and EVAL folder placement explicitly preserved in the material placement record
exactly three checksum records with sha256, byte_size, file_magic, and local reuse status
readiness note separates page-level U10 readiness from support-part, topology, connector, and full-design gaps
